form.personality: I can stare down a hell hound without flinching. I am always polite and respectful.
form.ideals: Greater Good. Our lot is to lay down our lives in defense of others.
form.bonds: I will face any challenge to win the approval of my order.
form.flaws: I judge others harshly, and myself even more severely.
form.features:
Divine Smite
Aura of Protection (CHA to saves within 10 ft)
Divine Health (immune to disease)
Sacred Weapon (Holy Symbol)
Extra Attack
form.spellsList:
Cantrips: —
1st: Bless, Cure Wounds, Protection from Evil and Good, Shield of Faith
2nd: Aid, Lesser Restoration, Find Steed
form.equipment:
- Longsword (1d8 slashing, versatile 1d10)
- Shield (+2 AC)
- Plate Armor
- Holy Symbol
- Healer's Kit
- Signet Ring of House Dawnblade
form.proficiencies: All armor, shields, simple weapons, martial weapons
form.notes: Divine Smite: expend spell slot for +2d8 radiant per slot level (up to 5d8). +1d8 vs undead/fiends.
